Video.summary: Flip Wilson and Vikki Carr choose to accept Carol's mission: to appear in the spoof "Mission: Improbable".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Flip Wilson, Vikki Carr

Video.summary: Robert Goulet, Rich Little & Pat Carroll guest. Rich impresses while Robert & Pat join "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little

Image.alt: Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little

Video.summary: Lynn Redgrave joins Carol in "A Dirty English Movie." In "Carol & Sis", Carol and Vicki try to hide a dog.
Video.title: Lynn Redgrave

Video.summary: Stiller & Meara star, showing off their act and joining in the sketch fun. Also: Carol as "Mary Worthless."
Video.title: Stiller and Meara

Video.summary: Dick Martin is the town gigolo on "As The Stomach Turns." Also: a spoof of "Sunset Boulevard."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Dick Martin

Video.summary: Paul Sand plays a shy man trying to gain confidence by listening to a self-help record.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Paul Sand

Video.summary: Barrie Chase and Larry Hovis guest star! Chase provides a musical number, and Hovis plays "The Marriage Game."
Video.title: Larry Hovis, Barrie Chase

Video.summary: Guest James Coco takes a slow boat to romance in the Saturday Night Tearjerker movie spoof, "One Way Ticket."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: James Coco, Pointer Sister

Video.summary: Sketches include: "The West Dakota County Fair", "War Is Heck", and another visit with "The Old Folks."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Wayne Rogers, Buddy Ebsen

Video.summary: Soupy Sales and Carol play a pair of shoppers browsing samples of sexy cologne.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Soupy Sales

Video.summary: Tim has to write a eulogy for his best friend. On "As The Stomach Turns", things turn bionic after a funeral.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays an airport guard. Carol & Harvey play actors suffering Carol's lack of contact lenses.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Shecky Greene & Eydie Gorme join for a rundown of TV programs. Also: "Carol & Sis" & "Ironstreet & Wife."
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Shecky Greene

Video.summary: Sammy Davis Jr. stars, appearing as a star who returns to his hometown. Also: a look at a No-Frills Airline.
Video.title: Sammy Davis Jr.

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars with Carol as unsuccessful Western movie stars in "The Saga Of Lily And Billy."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dionne Warwick, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters guests and is interviewed by Harvey. In "Carol & Sis", Carol and Harvey struggle with names.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Don Rickles guests as a house painter on this "Carol & Sis" sketch. Harvey and Carol face a home invasion.
Video.title: Don Rickles

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays a 35 year old orphan looking to be adopted.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Jack Cassidy

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features a take-off of the classic Elizabeth Taylor film "National Velvet".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol contends with a peeping tom. Later, Carol, Dick, Vicki, and Tim offer up a concert.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Jack Klugman plays a skeptical man annoyed by his sister-in-law's visiting date--a clairvoyant.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jack Klugman

Video.summary: The Rat Pack meets The Burnett Bunch when Peter Lawford guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Peter Lawford, Minnie Pearl

Video.summary: Funt & Mundane score a hit, leading to a performance. Also: Tim's "Oldest Man" character is completely at sea.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest star Ken Berry joins Carol, Dick, Vicki, and Tim for the musical movie spoof "Stolen Serenade."
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Tim Conway guest stars. Tim's engagement ring for Carol causes bad luck. Also featured: "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Mama, Eunice, and Ed return from an inspiring Sunday sermon. Also: Carol & Harvey share "Bedtime Honesty."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Features Dick as an airport traveller getting a farewell, and Tim as a steelworker seeking to do in his wife.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway appears in a sketch where two policemen go undercover. Also: a poker game on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Tim Conway guest, with Martha in a sketch about mothers, and Tim as "The Virgin Prince."
Video.title: Martha Raye, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Dick Van Dyke appears in a homage to Shirley Temple films, "Little Miss Showbiz", with Carol as Honey Bunny.
Video.title: Dick Van Dyke

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters returns. Also, "Carol & Sis" plan a surprise party; and Carol is "Mrs. Invisible Man."
Video.title: Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Guest star Steve Lawrence sings a duet with Dick, while Tim cracks jokes and a case as Danny Draft.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Rita Moreno guest stars, appearing in a sketch as a nurse. Also featured: Tim as a hapless officer.
Video.title: Rita Moreno

Video.summary: Features "Carol & Sis", where Harvey avoids Carol, and a take-off on "Back Street"..here called "Back Alley."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Nancy Wilson and Nanette Fabray star in "As The Stomach Turns." On "Carol & Sis", siblings practice First Aid.
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Guests Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, & David Frost join for an operatic, Italian-style Cinderella production.
Video.title: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Image.alt: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
